properties.name: fact_order_line_sk
properties.comments: Surrogate key for the fact row. Generated at load time.

properties.name: order_id
properties.comments: Degenerate dimension. Natural order identifier retained for traceability and reconciliation to source systems.

properties.name: line_item_id
properties.comments: Degenerate dimension. Natural line item identifier retained for source reconciliation.

properties.name: customer_sk
properties.comments: FK to dim_customer. References the SCD2 row current at time of order.

properties.name: product_sk
properties.comments: FK to dim_product.

properties.name: promotion_sk
properties.comments: FK to dim_promotion. Nullable; references a dedicated no-promotion row when no promotion is applied.

properties.name: order_date_sk
properties.comments: FK to dim_date. Derived from the order creation date in UTC. Format: YYYYMMDD.

properties.name: channel_sk
properties.comments: FK to dim_channel. Represents the channel through which the parent order was placed.

properties.name: quantity
properties.comments: Units ordered on this line item. Constrained greater than zero at ingestion.

properties.name: unit_price
properties.comments: Actual price per unit charged at time of order. Historical; does not update if list price changes.

properties.name: line_discount_pct
properties.comments: Line-level discount fraction (0.0000 to 1.0000). Distinct from order-level promotion discount.

properties.name: extended_price
properties.comments: Generated: quantity x unit_price x (1 - line_discount_pct). Primary additive revenue measure at line level.

properties.name: order_gross_value
properties.comments: Gross order value from the parent order. Repeated at line level to support order-level aggregation without a separate order table join.

properties.name: order_discount_amt
properties.comments: Order-level discount amount from the parent order. Repeated at line level.

properties.name: order_net_revenue
properties.comments: Derived: order_gross_value minus order_discount_amt. Repeated at line level.

properties.name: cost_amount
properties.comments: RESTRICTED - Standard cost multiplied by quantity (cost_price x quantity). Nullable when cost price is not available. Finance roles only.

properties.name: gross_margin
properties.comments: RESTRICTED - order_net_revenue minus cost_amount at line level. Nullable when cost data is unavailable. Finance roles only.

properties.name: load_timestamp
properties.comments: UTC timestamp at which this row was loaded into the warehouse. Supports incremental load audit.

collections.comments: Central fact table. Grain: one row per order line item. Additive measures support revenue, discount, and margin analysis across all dimensions.

properties.name: customer_sk
properties.comments: Surrogate key. Generated on each SCD2 version insert.

properties.name: customer_id
properties.comments: Natural key. System-assigned customer UUID from the source system. Stable across SCD2 versions.

properties.name: email
properties.comments: PII - Customer email address. Masked in non-production via Snowflake column masking policy.

properties.name: first_name
properties.comments: PII - Customer given name. Masked in non-production via Snowflake column masking policy.

properties.name: last_name
properties.comments: PII - Customer family name. Masked in non-production via Snowflake column masking policy.

properties.name: acquisition_channel
properties.comments: Channel of first registration. Values: Web, Store, Referral, Partner. Immutable attribute; does not trigger a new SCD2 version.

properties.name: current_segment
properties.comments: Segment at the time of this SCD2 row: Gold, Silver, Bronze, or New. Triggers a new version on change.

properties.name: lifetime_value
properties.comments: Cumulative net revenue snapshot at the time of this SCD2 row.

properties.name: is_active
properties.comments: Source system soft-delete flag. Propagated from the operational customer record.

properties.name: eff_start_date
properties.comments: Effective start date of this SCD2 row (inclusive). Set to the date the row was created or updated.

properties.name: eff_end_date
properties.comments: Effective end date of this SCD2 row (inclusive). Null indicates the currently active row.

properties.name: is_current
properties.comments: Current-row indicator. True for the active SCD2 row; false for all historical rows.

properties.name: load_timestamp
properties.comments: UTC load timestamp for this SCD2 row.

collections.comments: Customer dimension. SCD Type 2: each change in tracked attributes generates a new row. is_current flags the active row.

properties.name: product_sk
properties.comments: Surrogate key for the product dimension row.

properties.name: product_id
properties.comments: Natural key. System-assigned product UUID from the source system.

properties.name: sku
properties.comments: Stock-Keeping Unit code. Retained as a non-key business identifier.

properties.name: product_name
properties.comments: Published product name at time of load.

properties.name: list_price
properties.comments: Current standard selling price at time of load. Not historised.

properties.name: cost_price
properties.comments: RESTRICTED - Per-unit cost from the primary supplier. Nullable. Column-level masking policy enforced in Snowflake for non-finance roles.

properties.name: is_active
properties.comments: Soft-delete flag. Inactive products retained for historical order line integrity.

properties.name: supplier_id
properties.comments: Natural key of the primary supplier. Retained for traceability.

properties.name: supplier_name
properties.comments: Trading name of the primary supplier. Denormalised for direct BI access.

properties.name: supplier_country
properties.comments: Country of operation of the primary supplier. Denormalised for direct BI access.

properties.name: supplier_lead_days
properties.comments: Standard lead time in calendar days from the primary supplier.

properties.name: category_l1_id
properties.comments: Surrogate key of the Root-level (L1) category. Denormalised from the hierarchy for BI roll-up without recursive joins.

properties.name: category_l1_name
properties.comments: Name of the Root-level category. Denormalised for direct BI filtering.

properties.name: category_l2_id
properties.comments: Surrogate key of the Mid-level (L2) category. Denormalised from the hierarchy.

properties.name: category_l2_name
properties.comments: Name of the Mid-level category. Denormalised for direct BI filtering.

properties.name: category_l3_id
properties.comments: Surrogate key of the Leaf-level (L3) category. The category to which the product is directly assigned.

properties.name: category_l3_name
properties.comments: Name of the Leaf-level category. Denormalised for direct BI filtering.

properties.name: load_timestamp
properties.comments: UTC load timestamp for this product dimension row.

collections.comments: Product dimension. Denormalised to include supplier attributes and a flattened three-level category hierarchy to avoid recursive joins in BI tools.

properties.name: promotion_sk
properties.comments: Surrogate key for the promotion dimension row.

properties.name: promotion_id
properties.comments: Natural key. System-assigned promotion UUID. Set to promo_none for the no-promotion sentinel row.

properties.name: promotion_name
properties.comments: Descriptive promotion name. Set to No Promotion for the sentinel row.

properties.name: discount_type
properties.comments: Discount type. Values: Percentage, Fixed, BOGO, None (sentinel row).

properties.name: discount_value
properties.comments: Discount magnitude. Zero for BOGO and the sentinel row.

properties.name: start_date
properties.comments: Inclusive start date of the promotion validity period. Null for the sentinel row.

properties.name: end_date
properties.comments: Inclusive end date of the promotion validity period. Null for the sentinel row.

properties.name: load_timestamp
properties.comments: UTC load timestamp for this promotion dimension row.

collections.comments: Promotion dimension. Includes a dedicated no-promotion sentinel row (promo_none) to allow non-nullable FK joins from the fact table.

properties.name: date_sk
properties.comments: Surrogate key in YYYYMMDD format. Integer for efficient partitioning and range filtering.

properties.name: full_date
properties.comments: Calendar date value. Unique per row.

properties.name: day_of_week
properties.comments: ISO day of week: 1 (Monday) to 7 (Sunday).

properties.name: day_name
properties.comments: Full English name of the day (e.g. Monday).

properties.name: is_weekend
properties.comments: True if day_of_week is 6 (Saturday) or 7 (Sunday).

properties.name: is_holiday
properties.comments: True if the date is a public holiday in the primary trading country. Maintained by the data engineering team.

properties.name: week_of_year
properties.comments: ISO week number within the calendar year.

properties.name: month_number
properties.comments: Calendar month number (1-12).

properties.name: month_name
properties.comments: Full English name of the month (e.g. January).

properties.name: quarter
properties.comments: Calendar quarter (1-4).

properties.name: year
properties.comments: Four-digit calendar year.

collections.comments: Date dimension. Pre-populated calendar spanning the full analytical period. Supports day, week, month, quarter, and year grouping with weekend and holiday indicators.

properties.name: channel_sk
properties.comments: Natural surrogate. Uses the channel code value as the key (e.g. web, mobile, in_store, partner) given the low cardinality.

properties.name: channel_name
properties.comments: Full descriptive name of the channel (e.g. In-Store).

properties.name: channel_group
properties.comments: Higher-level grouping for channel analysis. Values: Digital (Web, Mobile) or Physical (In-Store, Partner).

collections.comments: Channel dimension. Classifies the commercial channel and channel group for order-level analysis. Conformed across the warehouse.

comments:
============================================================
RetailCo Analytics Platform  |  Data Model
Version 1.1  |  April 2025
Domains: Customer, Order, Product
Layers: Conceptual > Logical (3NF) > Physical (Snowflake Star Schema)
DBML Specification: https://dbml.dbdiagram.io/home/
============================================================

============================================================
LAYER 3 - PHYSICAL MODEL (Snowflake Star Schema)
Denormalised star schema at order line item grain.
Surrogate keys (VARCHAR(36) UUID), Snowflake-native types,
SCD Type 2 on dim_customer, flattened category hierarchy,
governance annotations on PII and restricted columns.
Index blocks on all FK columns and composite access patterns.
============================================================
